meaning: adj.埃塞俄比亚的,黑人的n.埃塞俄比亚人,黑人
examples: In the second race, the American competitor edged out the Ethiopian runner by less than a second.
People in Ethiopian highlands have adapted to living at high altitudes.
Could Norway keep its standard of living and yet cut its emissions to Moroccan or even Ethiopian levels?
Some people blame the violence on the resentment towards the Ethiopian troops who monitor the area.
The Ethiopian Government has blamed donor fatigue for an inadequate response to the impending crisis.
